testcase.name: test_get_midwife_notes_returns_array
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_iteration8.py:77: in test_get_midwife_notes_returns_array assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed: {"detail":"Insufficient permissions"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_midwife_note
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_iteration8.py:91: in test_create_midwife_note assert clients_response.status_code == 200, f"Get clients failed: {clients_response.text}" E AssertionError: Get clients failed: {"detail":"Insufficient permissions"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
